{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321223813C78D3449902D2FF4A67F"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7619670163160613657","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个，和我看过之前的有一本V震天的，也很像我非常喜欢这种风格，如果可以，希望作者能保持一下，最后我提醒一下，主角不是有斯安威斯坦吗？为什么还要用那个老爷传送？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774095632,"group_id":"7612867788360666136","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2488892381727214"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612867788360666136","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"67"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6274,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7299,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7619228417151910681","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这就是我要看到的口牙"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773991899,"group_id":"7612867788360666136","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"6","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6QecDuB4OOvbG2Quuwn/aDVDfvS6qRboNQK1aYtgLum","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e16e3ee769c14bf6858b661b87d12059~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619220&x-signature=7nYdYnrc9ekb5MQqcMS3zI31uJ4%3D","user_id":"2488892381727214","user_name":"我是浮光"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2488892381727214","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612867788360666136","book_info":{"abstract":"【赛博朋克2077】【往日之影】【边缘行者】【系统】【多女主】
正打着游戏的梁辰突然就穿越到了夜之城，街道上尸横遍野，血流成河，人群尖叫，NCPD还有暴恐机动队在怒吼射击，一副地狱场景。
梁辰以为这是自己在游戏里大开杀戒造成的，他是罪魁祸首，正准备跑路，没想到造成这一切的主角却不是他，而是一个从荒坂实验室跑出来的赛博疯子。
赛博疯子薄纱了一切，暴恐机动队小队，上百号NCPD全部败北，然后他盯上了梁辰，高高跃起，飞跃空中，螳螂刀一刀斩落而来。
梁辰下意识抬起来了手臂，想要格挡，他以为自己死定了，却没想到这时手臂展露出狰狞的炮口，那是游戏里五阶不朽级别的手臂义体，射弹发射器，没有反应过来，那爆杀了一切，轻松逃脱了亚当重锤追杀的赛博疯子，就此被一炮陨灭。
原来穿越而来的梁辰，继承了游戏主角V震天的所有一切。
自此，梁辰走上了传奇人生…………
女主：女V，百灵鸟，露西，丽贝卡。
主题：主角比较苟，有危险就把女V和百灵鸟悄悄护至身前，因为一身传奇不朽义体，全是世间仅有的，坏了没地方修，沾了灰了都心疼。
金手指，有系统，能发布任务，做任务能给技能点，能升级。
主角全属性义体全满但是等级技能全是白板","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9a82e4c19d8698ebaea7d73b685513a9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月下寻自在","author_id":"","book_id":"7612867788360666136","book_name":"赛博朋克：我乃V震天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#186878","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612876080810050072","read_count":"561","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"58152"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"39","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,系统,网游,赛博朋克,多女主,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9a82e4c19d8698ebaea7d73b685513a9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287893&x-signature=BiLxUPWY5rUVTh54blrKB0VIc4A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"76880885655","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":
